title: SCHC: OSCORE rules 5/6 use wrong address compression format
notes: Fixed with commit d524b6804: updated if-conditions in compress_coap (validation+addr), decompress_coap (min_residue+reconstruct) for LINK_LOCAL_OSCORE. Matches bug description. Rust side has parallel bug but out of scope for this bead.
close_reason: Fixed link-local OSCORE compression rules in schc.c per description; committed as d524b6804; updated validation, compression logic, min_residue, and address reconstruction. Verified via code review and git diff.
